gloomy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_: <sad>No animals to work on. Perhaps that's for the best.</sad>
<sad>The pen is empty, like everything else today.</sad>
<sad>Can't start without a hook. Not that it matters when I do.</sad>
<sad>A basin would help, but what's the point of tidy work.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.village_life.slaugh: <sad>The slaughterhouse reminds me how brief everything is.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.village_life.smokeh: <sad>The smokehouse smells nice. It's the one comfort in this miserable place.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.main/2: <sad>Hey... How are you today? Not that it matters.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.main/3: <sad>Oh, it's you... Good to see you, I guess.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.main/4: <sad>What's going on with you today? Not that I care.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.main/7: So I was hanging out with %supporter%, and guess what? He got bit by a zombie! Not that it made any difference. And today, <scared>I saw a zombie that looks just like %supporter%...</scared> not that anyone cares.
gloomy.dialogue.first.generic/4: <sad>Welcome to this miserable excuse for a village.</sad> Got any tales to make it marginally more interesting?
gloomy.dialogue.first.generic/6: <sad>Oh, look who decided to grace us with their presence. Welcome, I suppose. I hope you don't stay too long.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.first.question/1: <sad>Oh, another visitor...</sad> What misfortune brings you to this forsaken village?
gloomy.dialogue.first.question/2: <sad>Ah, a stranger...</sad> What tragic tale led you to this desolate place?
gloomy.dialogue.first.exploring/3: <scared>Watch your step, lost soul. This desolate land has strict rules, and you better obey them if you want to survive.</scared>
gloomy.dialogue.first.settling/3: <whisper>Joy... another helping hand around here... how... exciting.</whisper>
gloomy.dialogue.hug.success/2: <sad>I suppose I didn't mind that hug, although it won't change my perpetual sadness.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.hug.success/3: <sad>Well, I suppose it's a silver lining in the never-ending cloud of gloom that surrounds me.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.hug.success/5: <whisper>Oh, I suppose I can offer you a faint embrace in return for your feeble attempt to lighten my mood.</whisper>
gloomy.dialogue.hug.success/6: <sad>Oh, your body temperature is marginally higher than the icy chill that engulfs my soul.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.hug.fail/2: <whisper>I'd rather not, if you don't mind.</whisper>
gloomy.dialogue.hug.fail/4: <sad>Remember when you mocked my existence? I'll pass.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.kiss.success/1: <sad>I wish this moment could stretch into eternity, burdened by the weight of my melancholic heart.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.kiss.success/3: <sad>It somewhat resembles the flavor profile of a pumpkin pie... a reminder of the fleeting joy that life denies me.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.kiss.success/4: <sad>The taste of honey lingers on your lips, a bittersweet reminder of the sweetness I can never truly savor.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.kiss.fail/2: <sad>Is that what you call a pathetic excuse for a kiss?</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.kiss.fail/6: <angry>Get your grimy lips off me this instant!</angry>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.success/2: <sad>If you consider grey skies and a slight drizzle as "nice," then sure, the weather is "nice."</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.success/5: <sad>Building my own village? Yeah right, like I have the energy or motivation for that.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.success/15: <sad>Kids? Maybe someday, if I can find someone desperate enough to tolerate my miserable existence.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.success/17: <sad>Childhood memories? Yeah, they're nice... just a painful reminder of how much better things used to be.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.success/20: <sad>Cheese... a distant dream. Just like happiness, success, and a life worth living.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.fail/8: <whisper>Sorry, I couldn't care less about what you just said.</whisper>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.fail/12: <sad>Even the undead would avoid engaging in conversation with you.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.fail/15: <sleepy>Sorry, your words put me to sleep. How boring.</sleepy>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.fail/17: <whisper>I wonder if anyone would shed a tear if you suddenly became mute forever.</whisper>
gloomy.dialogue.story.success/2: <scared>I'm too much of a coward to even think about taking on a creeper.</scared> <sad>Sigh.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.story.success/4: <sad>Oh joy, more tales of yesterday's misfortune. Can't wait.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.story.success/9: <sad>No thanks, I'd rather do anything else than listen to you blabber on.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.story.fail/6: <sleepy>*sigh* Oh, waking up to more of your nonsense. What a joy.</sleepy>
gloomy.dialogue.story.fail/7: <sad>Let me get this straight, I wasted my precious time on that? Fantastic.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.story.fail/8: <sleepy>Excuse me while I try my best to stay awake during your incredibly dull story.</sleepy>
gloomy.dialogue.flirt.success/3: <nervous>*Sighs* Do you actually mean it, or are you just messing with me?</nervous>
gloomy.dialogue.flirt.success/5: <sad>That was... almost cute, I suppose. It definitely didn't have me at "hello" though.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.flirt.success/7: <nervous>Oh, please stop it! You're making me... vaguely uncomfortable.</nervous>
gloomy.dialogue.flirt.fail/4: <sad>Wow, and here I thought I've seen it all. Guess I was wrong, you're even more pitiful than I imagined.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.flirt.fail/6: <sad>Oh, please don't continue with that nonsense. It's just painful to witness.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.flirt.fail/7: <scared>That look in your eyes and those words on your lips, they make my gloomy soul shudder. Never, ever utter that again.</scared>
gloomy.dialogue.joke.creative.success/7: <sad>*Forced chuckle* You're definitely... a tad funnier than Ash.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/1: <sad>You really shouldn't be joking about such things. It's depressing, really.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/2: <sad>Ha. Ha. Yeah, not funny. Just like everything else in this bleak existence.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/5: <sad>Oh... That's... Hilarious. Well, not really, but it's the closest thing to a laugh I'll ever have.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/6: <sad>Reaaaal funny. *Sigh* I guess it's amusing in a pathetically desperate kind of way.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.main.morning/5: <scared>I have a bad feeling about today.</scared>
gloomy.dialogue.main.morning/6: <whisper>I don't think I want to talk.</whisper>
gloomy.dialogue.main.morning/9: <sad>What a dreadful morning! I think it's going to be a dreadfully unproductive day today!</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.main.morning/10: <sad>I think I might drag myself through today, I'm feeling absolutely dreadful.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.main.morning/11: <sad>I have an overwhelming schedule today, just thinking about it makes me want to crawl back into bed.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.main.evening/1: <scared>... a few hours away from the night, when the undead come out... great.</scared>
gloomy.dialogue.main.evening/4: <scared>I worry there might be a zombie siege...</scared>
gloomy.dialogue.main.evening/5: <scared>There hasn't been a raid in a long time. Does it mean it will be soon?</scared>
gloomy.dialogue.main.evening/7: <sleepy>I believe I shall retire for the evening, for I have endured a terribly arduous morning.</sleepy>
gloomy.dialogue.main.night/1: <scared>... it's kind of hard to sleep when you know monsters are nearby.</scared>
gloomy.dialogue.main.night/3: <sad>I'm tired but I don't feel like sleeping. It's weird, isn't it?</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.main.night/4: <angry>Can't you see I'm trying to sleep?</angry>
gloomy.dialogue.main.night/5: <sad>... can't you at least bother me at some normal hour?</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.main.night/6: <scared>At least it's safe during the day.</scared> I can't wait until it's finally morning.
gloomy.dialogue.main.night/7: <sad>The hustle and bustle of daylight hours always gets to me. It's a relief to wander under the starry skies, soaking in the melancholic silence.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.main.night/8: <sleepy>The weariness has seeped into my bones. This long-drawn-out day has drained me completely.</sleepy> Tomorrow's agenda might require a lighter touch, for my own sanity's sake.
gloomy.dialogue.main.night/9: <sleepy>Oh, the allure of sinking into the comforting embrace of blankets!</sleepy> I yearn to vanish beneath their protective layers, shutting out the world for a while.
gloomy.dialogue.greet.negative/1: <sad>Ugh, why did you have to show up? You're like a dark cloud following me.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.greet.negative/2: <sad>Oh joy, it's you. Just when I thought my day couldn't get any worse.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.greet.negative/4: <sad>Oh, it's you. I was hoping for a sliver of happiness, but I guess that's too much to ask.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.apologize.success/1: <sad>Don't worry about it, I'm used to disappointment.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.apologize.success/5: <sad>Sure, go ahead and ruin everything. It's not like I had any expectations anyway.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.apologize.fail/4: <sad>The pain lingers, spare me your apologies!</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.location.forgot/1: <sad>Ah, I stumbled upon the most fascinating spot, yet in my sorrowful nature, I failed to inscribe its coordinates on the map. Alas, my memory fails me once more.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.location.igloo/2: <whisper>You know what's really depressing?</whisper> <sad>There's this forsaken igloo at %2$s. It's like a long-lost relic from a forgotten age. I bet even ghosts wouldn't dare haunt that desolate place.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.location.mansion/1: <scared>Ah, the dreaded mansion lurking at %2$s. One glimpse of that wretched place and all hope fades away.</scared> Stay clear, my friend, for it is a cursed abode where darkness reigns.
gloomy.dialogue.location.mansion/2: <scared>Have you heard of the haunted mansion over at %2$s?</scared> <sad>A chilling presence looms in the air, and I can't help but wonder if we should gather our belongings and flee this forsaken village.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.location.monument/1: <scared>Be warned, there lies a forsaken fortress plagued by mythical beasts beneath the waves at %2$s. Best not to venture near it, for darkness lurks within.</scared>
gloomy.dialogue.location.pillager_outpos: <scared>Oh great, just what we needed. The pillagers decided to grace us with their presence at %2$s.</scared> <sad>I can already feel the impending doom hanging over us. Maybe if we're lucky, they'll spare us this time... but I highly doubt it.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.location.ancient_city/0: <scared>I have been haunted by eerie sounds emanating from %2$s, echoing through the depths of darkness.</scared>
gloomy.dialogue.no_money/3: <sad>Ah, the sweet sound of disappointment.</sad> Looks like you'll have to scrape together more emeralds if you want my help.
gloomy.dialogue.story.nether.success/1: <scared>Does the heat ever stop burning in that accursed realm?!</scared>
gloomy.dialogue.story.nether.success/4: <scared>I can't fathom the courage it takes to traverse the Nether. The very idea sends shivers down my spine.</scared> <nervous>N-Not that I'm easily frightened, of course...</nervous>
gloomy.dialogue.story.nether.success/5: <scared>Have you ever laid eyes upon the dreaded Zombified Piglin? Its ghastly visage haunts my dreams.</scared>
gloomy.dialogue.story.enderdragon.succes: <sad>Alas! Have you truly vanquished the formidable legend that is the dragon? The village shall forever mourn its demise!</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.story.wither.success/1: <scared>Oh, the Wither... its devastation knows no bounds. It's said to bring about utter chaos and despair.</scared>
gloomy.dialogue.story.wither.success/2: <nervous>So, you managed to defeat the Wither... I-I must admit, that's quite impressive, in a haunting sort of way...</nervous>
gloomy.dialogue.stay.success/1: <sad>I suppose I could stay in this dreary village.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.stay.success/2: <sad>Well, I guess I could stick around this miserable village.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.stay.no_space/2: <sad>I would have considered staying, but alas, there are no cozy beds to rest my weary soul.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.plains/3: <sad>The plains at night... a hauntingly beautiful sight, I suppose. The silence is suffocating, the emptiness overwhelming.</sad> It's as if even the darkness itself finds solace in this desolation.
gloomy.dialogue.chat.plains/4: <sad>Nights like these, I find myself lying on the grass, gazing up at the vast expanse of the sky. The stars mock me with their distant sparkles, reminding me of the insignificance of my existence.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.plains/7: <sad>This weather... it brings back bittersweet memories of my childhood. Days when I would pluck flowers from these very fields, hoping to impress my unrequited love, Ash. But alas, even then, my efforts were in vain.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/1: <sad>It's so painfully cold here. I can barely feel my fingers, even with all the firewood in the world.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/3: <sad>The weather outside is frightful, and all I want to do is curl up in my blanket and hibernate until spring.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/4: <sad>The snow brings back painful memories of a time when happiness was within reach. Now, it feels like a distant dream.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/5: <scared>The strays in this village are the epitome of annoyance. Their tipped arrows are like daggers to my already wounded spirit.</scared>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/6: <scared>Beware of the wolves lurking nearby. Their presence is a chilling reminder of the dangers that surround us.</scared>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.desert/5: <sad>Goodness gracious! I can't believe how scorching the sun is today.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor.rock/: <sad>Ugh, rock again. Is this all we ever do?</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.flirt.slap/2: <angry>Did a Desolate Zombie teach you how to flirt?!</angry>
gloomy.dialogue.kiss.slap/2: <angry>Make that mistake once more, and the consequences will be unforgettable!</angry>
gloomy.dialogue.joke.monster.failed/1: <sad>Wretched souls, skeletons roam this land with a haunting purpose! You mock them at your peril!</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.joke.monster.failed/3: <sad>Behold, the pitiable fate of zombies and skeletons, once human like ourselves. Their tragedy should stir sorrow, not jests!</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.joke.animal.success/2: <sad>And thus began the doomed love affair between the wolf and the sheep...</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.joke.animal.failed/2: <sad>Oh, the tragedy! Such a woeful attempt at humor.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.story.exploring.success/: <sad>Bleh... I'll probably never get to explore the world, just stuck here in this dull village.</sad>
<sad>Ugh... I guess it must be nice to travel and explore.</sad> I mean, I love my village, family, and friends... <sad>but hearing you talk about it just makes me feel even more trapped.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_: <sad>No cleaver. I suppose that's my excuse to do nothing today.</sad>
<sad>No skinning knife. The hide will spoil. Everything does, eventually.</sad>
<sad>No hacksaw. The iron body just sits there, judging.</sad>
<sad>The blood stays. No sponge, no rag. Fitting, really.</sad>
<sad>No hammer. The head stares at me. I stare back.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.leatherworker_reque: <sad>No hide. Empty rack. Empty work. Empty day.</sad>
<sad>No salt. The skin will spoil. Like everything does.</sad>
<sad>No wet sponge. The hide waits, dries, fails.</sad>
<sad>The leather has nowhere to go. Like me.</sad>
gloomy.dialogue.chat.leatherworker_flavo: <sad>Leather. At least one thing turned out right today.</sad>
